story.title: Redline
story.logline: A high-stakes racing rivalry turns deadly as Haider and Hadi engage in a no-holds-barred battle for dominance on the streets and track.

acts.label: Introduction
acts.description: Meet Haider, a ruthless street racing kingpin, and Hadi, a driven and talented young driver, as they engage in a high-stakes game of cat and mouse.

acts.label: Escalation
acts.description: As the rivalry between Haider and Hadi intensifies, the stakes grow higher, and the two drivers find themselves in a desperate fight for survival on the streets and track.

acts.label: Climax
acts.description: The annual championship car race becomes the stage for a high-stakes showdown between Haider and Hadi, with the winner claiming not only the trophy but also the title of ultimate racing champion.

acts.label: Resolution
acts.description: In the aftermath of the championship race, the true cost of the rivalry is revealed, and Haider and Hadi must confront the consequences of their actions.

story.world: A world where the streets and track are a battleground, where the line between victory and defeat is thin, and the stakes are always high.
